notes:
### v1.1.6

#### Added
- New General section in System settings.
- Toggle to hide or show the Set-Up Guide button in the header.
- Clear User Data option for removing configured characters and connected local character data.
- Confirmation dialog before Clear User Data can delete anything.
- System tray behavior: closing the window now hides LOA Tracker to the tray, with Show and Quit actions available from the tray icon.

#### Improved
- Windows startup handling now tries Task Scheduler first and falls back to the current-user registry startup entry when Task Scheduler access is denied.
- Start with Lost Ark and Start with LOA Logs now work better with background monitor mode and tray behavior.
- LOA Tracker now reveals the existing window from the tray/background instead of creating a second app instance.
- LOA Logs companion startup now requests an elevated Windows UAC launch when LOA Logs requires admin rights.
- Windows installer/update configuration now uses the NSIS per-machine setup path and passive updater install mode.

#### Fixed
- Removed repeated Lost Ark monitor process-list debug spam from the logs.
- Fixed the LOA Logs elevated launch command so paths are passed correctly to PowerShell.

#### Changed
- Startup monitoring, companion monitoring, and tray behavior now work together for a cleaner background tracking experience.
- Release notes and in-app changelog were refreshed for v1.1.6.

## Installation
Download `loatracker_1.1.6_x64-setup.exe` below.
